query: 把 switch 当轮 decision 延迟再往下压，而不是再扩测试面。

transcript.content: 这轮修复后，最明显的新问题不是答案错，也不是完全不降，而是：• 采样窗口一放大• guarded/runtime 成本就明显上升• stress 场景跑得很慢 ==》什么原因？

主要有 4 个原因。 1. `maxTurns` 修正后，shadow 输入直接变大了。 在 [dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js:88) 里，原来实际上只取最近 `12` 条消息；修正后变成最近 `12`…
可以，继续一口气长任务把刚才你说的做完；
你觉得已经做完了，就给一个测试报告；
**测试报告** 这轮我把 OpenClaw 的 GC 当成“宿主端真实 prompt 控制”来测，不再只看 shadow telemetry。 结论是：**已经明显比修复前更好，但还不建议宣称“最终完全达标”**。
codex 中的 每轮context中写的Context(估算) 可以去掉了
**OpenClaw GC 测试报告** **结论** - 这轮已经把“切题后几乎不回落”的主问题修掉了。 - 修复后，真实发给 LLM 的 prompt 在关键 case 上出现了**明确回落**，而不是只“止涨”。 - 但我不建议现在就宣布“最终完全达标”，因为放大采样窗口后，runtime 成本明显上升，性能还需要继续压。
我先 review 了测试脚本，结论是：**脚本口径基本没问题，问题主要在实现**。 原因有两个： - `maxTurns` 原来按“消息条数”算，长会话的大头经常根本没进 decision 视野。 - guarded 每轮都跑 shadow/decision，很多明显“继续同一话题”的轮次也在付完整成本，但最后并不会 apply。
codex 中的 每轮context中写的Context(估算) 可以去掉了
已经去掉了。现在 `npm run codex:vscode:gc:header --silent` 默认空输出，所以 Codex 每轮不会再自动写 `Context(估算)`。 我保留了手动观测入口： - `npm run codex:vscode:gc:footer --silent` - `npm run codex:vscode:gc:size --silent` - `npm run…
把 switch 当轮 decision 延迟再往下压，而不是再扩测试面。
做完了。 先说原因： - `switch` 当轮慢，主要不是答案生成慢，而是每轮先跑一次 shadow decision。 - 之前放大采样窗口后，decision 看见的 transcript 更长了。 - 很多明显 `continue` 的轮次也在白跑 decision，成本高但不 apply。 - `switch` 当轮还要走 `codex_exec`，这是最重的一次。

decision.archive_summary: Main active topic remains runtime-cost reduction after the fix: enlarging the sampling window increased guarded/runtime overhead, especially in stress cases. Earlier analysis attributed cost to a larger shadow input after the maxTurns correction, decision work being done on many obvious continue turns, and switch turns being especially heavy. A test report concluded prompt drop behavior improved versus before, but performance was still not fully acceptable. A side request to remove the Codex 'Context(估算)' header was completed and can leave raw prompt; only its durable preference may survive as a pin if needed.
decision.reasoning_summary: The conversation is still on the same active optimization thread, so use continue. Keep raw context for the current performance/switch-latency work, especially the latest user turn and nearby implementation result. Evict the solved side-topic about removing the context header and the now-off-topic reporting block. Preserve the older performance diagnosis and test conclusion as compact pins so the next turn can retain why switch-delay work matters without carrying all raw turns.

A test report concluded prompt drop behavior improved versus before, but performance was still not fully acceptable. A side request to remove the Codex 'Context(估算)' header was completed and can leave raw prompt; only its durable preference may survive as a pin if needed.

Keep raw context for the current performance/switch-latency work, especially the latest user turn and nearby implementation result.
